code.description:
An [API error code](https://docs.payments.service.gov.uk/api_reference/#gov-uk-pay-api-error-codes)that explains why the payment failed.

`code` only appears if the payment failed.

description.example: Invalid attribute value: amount. Must be less than or equal to 10000000

field.description: The parameter in your request that's causing the error.

header.description: The header in your request that's causing the error.
